CREATE TABLE test_table_1 (id UInt32, value Float64);
SELECT id FROM test_table_1 WHERE id <> 2 AND value <> 20.5;
CREATE TABLE test_table_2 (id UInt32, value Float64);
SELECT t1.id, t1.value FROM test_table_1 t1 JOIN test_table_2 t2 ON t1.id <> t2.id WHERE t1.value <> t2.value;
SELECT id FROM (SELECT * FROM test_table_1 WHERE value <> 30.5) AS filtered WHERE id <> 3;
CREATE TABLE test_table_3 (id UInt32, name String);
SELECT * FROM test_table_3 WHERE name <> 'Alice' AND id NOT IN (SELECT id FROM test_table_3 WHERE name = 'Bob');
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_table_1 WHERE value <> 30.0 GROUP BY id HAVING COUNT(id) <> 0;
SELECT MAX(value) FROM test_table_1 WHERE value <> (SELECT AVG(value) FROM test_table_1);
